scenes.description: Mori Calliope, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Takanashi Kiara finish their performance of 'Bibideba'.
Mori Calliope performs her solo song 'Nekkyo'.
Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina'nis perform 'Sepia'.
